title: Iron Coals
description: A vanilla+ mod that adds tiered coals
body: [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.com/invite/eeFZXAQaSX) ### Iron Coals is a mod that adds vanilla+ fuels. ### **Features** Adds 6 tiers of coal * Iron Coal is 1.5x better than regular Coal (12 items) * Gold Coal is 3.0x better than regular Coal (24 items) * Diamond Coal is 6.0x better than regular Coal (48 items) * Emerald Coal is 12.0x better than regular Coal (96 items) * Netherite Coal is 480.0x better than regular Coal (7680 items) * Aeon Coal lasts forever… at a great price to make(∞ items) - Coal chunks smelt 1/8th the respective coal
